name: Olympic Runner Game
description: Experience the ultimate icy adrenaline rush in Olimpic Runner: Olympic Gold! Dash through the frozen tundra and compete in the most prestigious winter sporting event in the Antarctic. As a plucky man athlete, your goal is simple: Run, slide, and jump your way to the podium while navigating treacherous glacial landscapes. Whether youre sliding solo or aiming for the gold, the thrill of the chill is just a tap away. Precision and timing are everything: one slip could mean the difference between a medal and a wipeout!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play Space Up Arrow X Key Jump Start Game Down Arrow Duck Slide Left Mouse Click Jump Enter Restart Game after Game Over
